meaning: adj.(古罗马建筑师)维特鲁威风格的
examples: Vitruvian Man - Unlock all 20 pieces of Subject 16's video. (Bronze, 20g).
As Leonardo da Vinci did with the human body, and his Vitruvian Man, a great number of studious men have done the same thing with the right proportions of the vehicles.
Considered the most anatomically correct drawing of its day, Da Vinci's The Vitruvian Man had become a modern-day icon of culture, appearing on posters, mouse pads, and T-shirts around the world.
